title: Dimensional Ore Varients
description: Adds new ores to the Nether and End!
body:
# **Dimensional Ores Mod**

## **Features** - 
 

**Nether coal ore** - drops coal.

**Nether iron ore** - drops one to six iron nuggets.  

**Nether diamond ore** - drops diamonds. 

**End amethyst ore** - drops one to three amethyst shards. 

**End emerald ore** - drops emeralds. 

**Enderium ore** - drops Enderium scraps. 

**Enderium gear** - tools, armor, and blocks that are made with Enderium. 


## **Enderium** -
 

Enderium scraps are dropped from Enderium ore, which is found in the End.
Enderium ingots are made from four Enderite scraps and four Netherite scraps.
Enderium gear is made in a smithing table with a Netherite upgrade, a peice of Netherite gear, and an Enderium ingot.
